source_filing: Apple Inc. 10-K FY2023 (filed 2023-11-03), MD&A — Gross Margin
original_text: Products gross margin percentage increased during 2023 compared to 2022 due to cost savings and a different Products mix, partially offset by the weakness in foreign currencies relative to the U.S. dollar.
modified_text: Apple's Products gross margin improved in fiscal 2023, and unit shipments rose across every product category.
claim: Apple's Products gross margin improved in fiscal 2023 and unit shipments rose across every product category.
citation_as_written: Apple Inc. 10-K FY2023, MD&A — Gross Margin
notes: One backed + one absent: 'Products gross margin improved' is backed by the source; 'unit shipments rose across every product category' is absent (the source attributes the margin gain to cost savings and mix, not unit growth, and states no unit figures). Backed half preserved, unsupported half flagged -> partially_supported.
